name: Puppy Chow
recipeIngredient: 1 box Krispix Cereal or any type of Chex Cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cereal in a large mixing bowl.
2. Melt butter, chocolate chips, and peanut butter together in a saucepan over low heat until just melted.
3. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the cereal and gently stir to combine.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Once cooled, transfer the mixture to a resealable plastic bag. Add some powdered sugar, seal the bag, and shake it until all pieces are coated.
++++++++++++++++++
